findings.title: Verify SWA region availability in swedencentral
findings.description: Governance constraints note SWA deployment to swedencentral per allowed-locations policy. Static Web App region support should be verified during terraform plan to confirm swedencentral is accepted.
findings.recommendation: Add a pre-deployment validation step that runs `az staticwebapp list-skus --location swedencentral` or attempts a terraform plan before full apply.

findings.title: Document policy exemption request process
findings.description: If SWA swedencentral deployment fails due to region limitations, a policy exemption for westeurope may be needed. The governance constraints document should include a section on how to request exemptions.
findings.recommendation: Add a 'Policy Exemption Procedure' subsection under Plan Adaptations with contact/process details.

compact_for_parent: Gov P1: 0 must-fix, 1 should-fix (verify SWA swedencentral region), 1 suggestion (doc exemption process). PASS.
